title: tool projection does not require a tool call id
manifest_yaml:
agent_control_specification_version: 0.3.1-beta
policies:
  p:
    type: rego
    query: data.acs.verdict
intervention_points:
  pre_tool_call:
    tool_name_from: $snap.tool_call.name
    policy:
      id: p
    policy_target: $snap.tool_call.args
tools:
  search:
    type: Tool
    clearance: internal
